demo.name: Survivor's Boots
description: A roughly made outfit, well suited for hacking through jungle thickets and fending off boar tusks.
comment: Each time we journey to where the sky meets the sea, we begin a new legend.
- Exquemelin, a traveler

demo.name: Marksman's Tricorn
description: Tortuga's marksmen favor attire made of light fabric.
It allows easier movement across rough terrain and steadier shots at moving targets.
comment: Shoot first, ask questions second.

demo.name: Marksman's Pants
description: Tortuga's marksmen favor attire made of light fabric.
It allows easier movement across rough terrain and steadier shots at moving targets.
comment: Shoot first, ask questions second.

demo.name: Marksman's Doublet
description: Tortuga's marksmen favor attire made of light fabric.
It allows easier movement across rough terrain and steadier shots at moving targets.
comment: Shoot first, ask questions second.

demo.name: Flibustier's Boots
description: This outfit, sewn from coarse fabric, isn't about protection - it's about speed.
It allows swift movement and easy use of the blade.
comment: Armor is for cowards.
Your best protection is a blade that pierces the enemy's heart.

demo.name: Flibustier's Gloves
description: This outfit, sewn from coarse fabric, isn't about protection - it's about speed.
It allows swift movement and easy use of the blade.
comment: Armor is for cowards.
Your best protection is a blade that pierces the enemy's heart.

demo.name: Privateer's Hat
description: An elegant attire worn by captains.
It's just as easy to deal lethal blows during a boarding operation as to strut about at the governor's reception.
comment: We are not pirates. We are privateers.
We have papers, seals, and good lawyers.
- captain Benjamin Hornigold
